hero.headline: Digital Engineering Studio that endures.
hero.subheadline: We design and build precise, performant digital architecture for brands that intend to last. Beyond websites and applications—we engineer experiences.

vision._todo: TODO: aguardando tradução oficial do brand book — texto duplicado do EN
vision.headline: Orchestrating the Future of Digital Interaction
body: At Eprox, we believe that technology must transcend basic functionality. We create far more than websites, applications, and systems: we develop digital engineering experiences that seamlessly unite strategy, premium design, and cutting-edge technology to transform ambitious ideas into high-impact digital products.

Every single project is architected to deliver flawless performance, pioneering innovation, and a memorable user journey. Our absolute goal is to construct solutions that not only captivate visually but generate measurable business growth, solidify brand authority, and accelerate our clients' market reach.

foundation._todo: TODO: aguardando tradução oficial do brand book — texto duplicado do EN
foundation.headline: The Genesis of Precision
body: Eprox was born from a singular, powerful realization: the digital landscape was saturated with disposable interfaces, but desperately lacking in structural mastery. Our founder, Elis, envisioned a studio where the meticulousness of physical engineering could meet the infinite possibilities of software design.

Bringing together elite software architects and visionary designers, Elis established Eprox to bridge the gap between heavy technical systems and cinematic user experiences. Today, we stand as a global sanctuary for brands seeking digital solutions that are as robust under the hood as they are breathtaking on the surface. We don't just build for the web; we engineer legacies.
